title: WebNami vs DropInBlog — A Free, Self-Hosted Alternative
description: DropInBlog charges $29–$99/month to embed a blog on your site. WebNami is free and self-hosted — a complete blogging platform with no monthly fee.

hero.heading: A complete blog platform without the DropInBlog monthly fee
hero.subheading: DropInBlog is a SaaS embeddable blog that charges $29–$99/month just to add blogging to your site. WebNami is a complete, free, self-hosted blogging platform — own your content, pay nothing recurring, and get a faster static site in the bargain.

reasons.heading: Zero recurring cost
reasons.body: DropInBlog starts at $29/month — $348/year just to have a blog. WebNami is completely free and open source. Host the static output on any free tier provider.

reasons.heading: Own your content
reasons.body: DropInBlog stores your posts in their database. If they shut down or raise prices, your content is at risk. WebNami keeps everything as local Markdown files you fully control.

reasons.heading: No widget lag
reasons.body: DropInBlog loads content through a JavaScript embed, adding latency to every page. WebNami generates static HTML — your blog content is part of the page from the first byte.

reasons.heading: Better SEO architecture
reasons.body: Embedded widgets can hurt SEO because content loads after the initial HTML. WebNami's static output gives search engines clean, fully-rendered HTML on every request.
